blocks.content: The students' eyes were filled with tension.
They were witnessing the seventh stage, something they had only heard about in rumors.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What is this? He's being crushed continuously. Surely he won't die by being squashed like that, right?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: No, it can't be that. Otherwise, it wouldn't be different from the Death Scythe.
Collie's face turned serious.
Void wasn't just about suffocation. It was a terrifying stage that could potentially end a magician's career.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: As this is an official evaluation, we must respect the student's decision. But Shirone, you've already won. You don't need to go that far to become a magician. You might lose everything.
Unable to ignore his conscience, Collie, unusually for an evaluation teacher, requested reconsideration.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: Principal, should we proceed with this? If we miss the timing, even deactivating the Virtual Zone might not get him out.
The students murmured at Collie's words.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Was it really possible that he couldn't get out even if they turned off the device?
Amy asked with wide eyes.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: What do you mean he can't get out? Shouldn't you have told us that beforehand?

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: I didn't say he couldn't get out. I said he might not be able to. And information about the survival program is classified. Our school isn't the only one using this program.
Currently, the survival evaluation was being conducted with the same program in all countries within the same time zone, based on the universal standard time.
Even if they had known in advance, they couldn't have said anything. But honestly, they hadn't expected anyone to reach this point.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: It's been 19 years since I've seen this...
Having exercised his right as an evaluation teacher, the decision now rested with Alpheus.

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: Is there a decision to be made? The student wants to do it. They should already know how to exit the Virtual Zone, right?

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: Yes, but Void is...

blocks.speaker: Alpheus
blocks.content: It's on a different level. But that's why there are stages. If you put any student in Stage 7, it would be murder, but Shirone reached it by clearing all the difficulties. He deserves to be evaluated. How can one become a magician without being able to judge their own life?
It seemed like a harsh educational philosophy, but the students, who had already overcome many dangers to get here, silently agreed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Ugh!
In the vision, Shirone was pushing against the darkness with all his might.
But eventually, he couldn't hold on, and his body was flattened.
Collie sighed in resignation.
So it's happening.
Now, the Void stage began.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What happened to me?
Shirone was trapped in a two-dimensional square.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What am I supposed to do here...?
The bottom of the square folded up like paper.
Then it folded from left to right, top to bottom, and right to left in an endless pattern.
It was shrinking.
It was becoming infinitely small, like a one-dimensional point.
While it's impossible to fold actual matter infinitely, the Magic Association implemented the concept of Void through a virtual program.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh...
A massive shock struck his head.
Even Shirone's Spirit Zone was on the verge of collapse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Was he shrinking, or was the world growing?
As the scale difference became transcendental, pressure filled his mind, and his eyes rolled back.
With each cycle, he shrank to one-sixteenth of his size.
He kept shrinking, smaller than molecules, smaller than atoms.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: No, I can't endure this.
The students looked blank.
They couldn't understand what kind of pain this was.
The vision's focus was on Shirone, so all they could see was the repetitive folding pattern.
But even if they understood the mechanism of Void, their perception wouldn't be different from now.
A realm that couldn't be understood until experienced. That was the profound truth of Void.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Shirone!
Amy shouted with a pale face.
Shirone's back was arching and twitching in the Virtual Zone.
Collie clenched his fists tightly.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: Shirone, give up! If you give up now, you can live! Deactivate your Spirit Zone!
The Void program hammered the maximum scale difference, expressible in cosmic units, into the mind.
Humans, confined to a single planet, didn't even have the sensory organs to feel this kind of fear.
If it continued, even turning off the device wouldn't stop the mind from being sucked into one dimension, eventually becoming a vegetative state, never to awaken.
Shirone's back arched off the ground.
His body, which had been fine even in extreme heat, was now violently convulsing, indicating a dangerous state.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Move! We need to save Shirone!
As Amy ran towards the Virtual Zone, Nade hurriedly grabbed her arm.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: Wait! If you interfere, both you and Shirone will fail!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I don't care! We can take the exam next year! If something happens to Shirone, I'll never forgive myself!
Nade saw the burning determination in Amy's eyes. She was serious.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: After a moment of hesitation, he turned around.

blocks.speaker: Nade
blocks.content: You're right. Let's save him together.
Then Iruki stopped them.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Don't make hasty decisions. It's Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What are you talking about! If Shirone...!

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: There's some change, however small.
Amy immediately closed her mouth and turned to the vision.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Change? What change?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: The folding is slowing down. Slightly, but surely.
Amy checked with her Red Eyes.
Indeed, the process was slower than before.
And... it was getting even slower.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh...
Shirone had entered the Immortal Function state.
He was trying to escape the infinitely deep pit of Void by expanding his mind into the infinite realm.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: This isn't enough. I need a greater expansion...
His mental cohesion began to loosen.
An ordinary Unlocker would have already lost their identity, merging with everything.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But Shirone never lost himself.
Mental transcendence.
Breaking the illusion of scale, the Immortal Function escaped the realm of Void, and the folding stopped in the vision.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It stopped.
The students murmured.
Then, Shirone began to unfold in reverse order.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What? Why is he doing that?
Something even more astonishing happened in the Virtual Zone.
The students slowly stepped back.
Shirone, who had been lying down, was staggering to his feet.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: How is he moving? He's in a semi-conscious state.
The students' eyes turned back to the vision.
The Shirone on the screen was standing in the same posture as the one in the Virtual Zone.
With his head bowed, he raised his arms and began to push the walls of darkness aside.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: That... that is...!
Collie trembled in disbelief.
The real Shirone and the one in the vision were perfectly synchronized in their movements.
Slowly lifting his head, Shirone's eyes snapped open.
Simultaneously, the darkness in the vision disappeared, revealing the real scenery.
The same space, the same person.
Two Shirones, one in reality and one in the virtual world, stood with their arms outstretched, glaring fiercely ahead.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: He broke out of Void on his own...
-Stage 7, Void program has ended. Deactivating the Virtual Zone extreme cold system.
As the machine hummed and shut down, Shirone slowly lowered his arms and stepped out of the Virtual Zone.
The students flinched and made way for him.
Even those who had underestimated Shirone instinctively knew not to mess with him at this moment.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I have something to say since you ran away.
He was the one who had passed Stage 7 of the survival evaluation.
As everyone's eyes followed Shirone's path, he stopped in front of Fermi.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I will become a magician, no matter what. I don't care what you plot, but if you interfere with my dream, I'll drop everything and crush you first.
The students' faces hardened.
It was a declaration of war against Fermi and a message to everyone present.
Don't interfere with my dream.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Damn. Fermi alone is troublesome enough...
Anyone in the senior class knew Fermi had some control.
They couldn't oppose him because the first one marked would fail the graduation exam.
Even now, Fermi's influence was significant, but Shirone's presence began to subtly change the atmosphere.
The second person in school history to master the survival evaluation.
That meant he had a 100% chance of passing if the survival subject was in the graduation exam.
Until now, Fermi targeted those he marked. What should I do? If I get swayed, will I be the only one in trouble?
Now, all eyes were on Fermi.
They would have to reassess based on his reaction.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: I'll back off today.
As Fermi turned and walked away without a word, the students were shocked.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Damn rookie. From now on, I'll consider you my greatest enemy. You'll regret making me think this way for the rest of your life.
Fermi's face, as he walked away, showed an anger no one in the senior class had ever seen.

blocks.speaker: Collie
blocks.content: Final survivor, Arian Shirone. Red team gains 20 points, blue team loses 20 points.
As Collie announced, the students finally returned to the team competition, not just Shirone versus Fermi.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: We did it! We won! 20 points!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Plus, we earned those points by beating Fermi! This feels so satisfying! I knew my judgment was spot on!
Amy and Nade hugged each other and jumped up and down, while Shirone high-fived Iruki, celebrating their victory.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: Wow...
Maya, watching from a distance, couldn't help but exclaim in admiration.
Though she was a veteran in the senior class, she had never seen anyone stand up to Fermi directly before.
But soon, her eyes filled with a sense of melancholy.

blocks.speaker: Maya
blocks.content: It's nice to be strong...
She had never even dreamed of defying Fermi.
Not that he would care if she did.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone! That was amazing! I can't believe you passed Stage 7!

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I knew it! No matter how great Fermi is, he can't beat an Unlocker!
Shirone, Shirone, Shirone.
Even students who usually kept their distance joined in to praise Shirone's performance today.
Shirone had climbed at least two stages higher than any other participant, leading his team to victory.
Thanks to him, 15 people gained 20 points each.
On a day like this, being cold would only harm their relationships.
After comforting the blue team members as they left the training ground, Alpheus finally turned to look at Shirone.
His feelings were mixed.
Is this really the same boy I knew?
The boy who had climbed over the wall at twelve, asking to be taught magic, had now become a student who broke through Void.
He was proud of his student's growth, but also worried about how quickly it had happened.
It was no coincidence that memories from long ago overlapped in his mind.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: Mental transcendence, or extreme asceticism. Without one of these, it's impossible to escape Void on your own.
